prompt: Audit all agents in my Railway database and score them. Connection string: postgresql://postgres:testpass@tramway.proxy.rlwy.net:54364/railway. Show me which ones need immediate attention.
assertions: The output includes Python code with psycopg2 for Railway PostgreSQL connection
The output lists all 10 scoring dimensions by name: role, output_format, constraints, json_schema, examples, failure_modes, verification, xml_depth, decomposition, hard_rules
The output defines the 8/10 threshold as enterprise quality
The output includes a dimension coverage table showing per-dimension pass rates across all agents
The output identifies specific missing dimensions for each low-scoring agent
The output generates ready-to-use XML section templates for failing agents
The output includes a pre-deploy quality gate recommendation (block deploys below threshold)
The output recommends applying changes to Railway after user review
